LearningSession.title: Learning Session
LearningSession.description: Represents a recitation, quiz, or tutoring event by a student

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the student

date.description: Readable localized date when session took place

ChatSession.title: Chat Session
ChatSession.description: A discussion session about a Matn with the AI Assistant

matnName.description: Name of the Matn associated with the chat

lastUpdated.description: ISO timestamp of the last message in this session

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: An individual message within a conversation

sessionId.description: Reference ID to the parent ChatSession

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp when the message was sent

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents the student's personal details, profile image and application preferences.

userId.description: The unique identified of the user

displayName.description: Full name or alias of the student

photoURL.description: Firebase Storage or standard public URL link to user profile photo

settings.description: A map of user configuration preferences

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the profile last update

/users/{userId}.description: Personal profiles and custom preferences for the authenticated users

/learning_sessions/{sessionId}.description: List of student learning sessions and activities

/chat_messages/{messageId}.description: History of individual chat messages across sessions
